untranslatable_reason: The signal requires tracking 'recent swing high/low' (requires n-bar lookback window), '3 consecutive lower lows with no new highs' (requires multi-bar pattern matching across an unknown window), and dynamic ATR-based stops relative to swing points. These require state management and pattern recognition beyond simple point-in-time indicator comparisons. The 'trend_confirmation_bars' parameter also implies a confirmation window that cannot be expressed as a single condition. Additionally, 'price structure shows 3 consecutive lower lows' requires historical comparison logic not supported by the allowed operators.
translation_notes: Entry logic approximated as: price breaks above previous high AND 20-MA above 50-MA (uptrend configuration). Exit uses pivot S1 as proxy for swing low area with ATR multiple, plus MA crossover. A full implementation would require custom indicator for swing detection and multi-bar pattern recognition.
